triggers.name: Enemy timer: Abduction of Strength
triggers.comments: ~6m00s at level 50 (formula 3, cap 60 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; ShadowKnight level 52. Landing or damage lines bind the bar to its mob; area effects fan out to one target-bound bar per landing.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Abduction of Strength
triggers.pattern: ^Your Abduction of Strength(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))? spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.
